entity.summary: Fully on-chain decentralized exchange on MegaETH combining spot markets, perpetual futures, lending, and unified cross-margin collateral through a single trading venue.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates World Markets Spot, World Markets Perps, lending, ATLAS risk-engine, and unified-margin surfaces into one exchange entity. No exact public launch date is assigned in this batch.

evidence.title: World Markets official documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes fully on-chain, non-custodial spot, perpetual, and lending markets on MegaETH with universal margin and direct smart-contract execution.

evidence.title: World Markets protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol profile reports current MegaETH TVL, fees, revenue, spot DEX volume, perpetual volume, and identifies World Markets as the canonical MegaETH DEX.
